mapper.select:
SELECT b.book_id AS bookId, b.book_title AS bookTitle, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.author_name AS authorName, b.book_price AS bookPrice, COALESCE(s.totalSales, 0) AS totalSales, COALESCE(r.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating FROM book b
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalSales FROM orderitem GROUP BY book_id ) s ON b.book_id = s.book_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, AVG(review_score) AS avgRating FROM review GROUP BY book_id ) r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
WHERE b.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b2.category_id FROM book b2 JOIN orderitem oi2 ON b2.book_id = oi2.book_id JOIN orders o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id WHERE o2.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) AND b.book_id NOT IN ( SELECT oi3.book_id FROM orderitem oi3 JOIN orders o3 ON oi3.order_id = o3.order_id WHERE o3.member_idx = #{member_idx} )
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
ORDER BY s.totalSales DESC
ORDER BY r.avgRating DESC
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.book_id AS bookId, b.book_title AS bookTitle, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.author_name AS authorName, b.book_price AS bookPrice, COALESCE(s.totalSales, 0) AS totalSales, COALESCE(r.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating FROM book b
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalSales FROM orderitem GROUP BY book_id ) s ON b.book_id = s.book_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, AVG(review_score) AS avgRating FROM review GROUP BY book_id ) r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
WHERE b.category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT b2.category_id FROM book b2 JOIN wishlist w ON b2.book_id = w.book_id WHERE w.member_idx = #{member_idx} ) AND b.book_id NOT IN ( SELECT w2.book_id FROM wishlist w2 WHERE w2.member_idx = #{member_idx} )
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
ORDER BY s.totalSales DESC
ORDER BY r.avgRating DESC
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.book_id AS bookId, b.book_title AS bookTitle, b.cover_image AS coverImage, b.author_name AS authorName, b.book_price AS bookPrice, COALESCE(s.totalSales, 0) AS totalSales, COALESCE(r.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating FROM book b
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalSales FROM orderitem GROUP BY book_id ) s ON b.book_id = s.book_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT book_id, AVG(review_score) AS avgRating FROM review GROUP BY book_id ) r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
WHERE b.category_id IN
#{categoryId}
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
ORDER BY s.totalSales DESC
ORDER BY r.avgRating DESC
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
